libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Ensure the generated/updated test setup applies native runtime system properties for 5.0.1 as well: `-Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow` and `-Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true`. Prefer self-contained loopback HTTP server tests using `Vertx.createHttpServer()` and `WebClient`; avoid OAuth2-specific APIs unless explicitly adding the optional Vert.x OAuth2 dependency.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The existing 5.0.0 build logic gates the Netty runtime properties on `libraryVersion == '5.0.0'`, so override testing with `GVM_TCK_LV=5.0.1` can miss them.

The artifact exposes OAuth2WebClient APIs whose signatures reference optional `vertx-auth-oauth2` types; generated tests that directly exercise those APIs may need an extra dependency, but core WebClient, caching, sessions, forms, redirects, and local HTTP coverage do not.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency or Docker service is needed for meaningful Vert.x Web Client coverage; tests can use an in-process Vert.x HTTP server. However, Vert.x 5.0.1 still resolves Netty 4.2.x, so the Java 25 native run needs the same Netty unsafe-access runtime properties currently applied only to 5.0.0.
